# ACF Standard — Agentic Commerce Framework®
# https://www.acfstandard.com

> The Agentic Commerce Framework® (ACF) is the definitive governance methodology for deploying, supervising, and controlling autonomous agentic systems in commercial environments. Created by Vincent DORANGE in 2025.

## About
ACF is the first governance standard for autonomous AI agents in business. It provides a complete methodology built on 4 founding principles, structured in 4 operational layers, measured through 18 KPIs, and implemented via 8 sequential modules.

## Key Concepts
- 4 Founding Principles: Decision Sovereignty, Governance by Design, Ultimate Human Control, Traceable Accountability
- 4 Operational Layers: Strategic, Tactical, Operational, Technical
- 4 Maturity Levels: Level 0 Classical Automation, Level 1 Assisted Agents, Level 2 Governed Agents (recommended), Level 3 Supervised Autonomy
- DDA (Delegated Decision Agent Officer): the human authority designated to supervise all autonomous agents
- Emergency Stop Protocol: 3-level intervention mechanism (tactical pause, operational stop, full stop)

## 7 Scoring Dimensions
- Organisation: governance structure, roles, and decision-making frameworks
- Operations: processes, workflows, and operational readiness for agentic systems
- AI Usage: adoption, deployment patterns, and responsible use of AI agents
- Automation: level and quality of automated processes and agent orchestration
- Data & Systems: data governance, system architecture, and integration maturity
- Sovereignty: decision control, human oversight, and autonomy boundaries
- Business Performance: measurable outcomes, KPIs, and value delivery from agentic systems

## Products
- ACF Checker (compliance-checker): free AI governance compliance verification tool
- ACF Score (acf-score.com): free online diagnostic to evaluate AI governance maturity
- ACF Auditor: 107-question maturity audit across 7 dimensions with live scoring, insight engine, and personalized roadmap
- ACF Control: real-time governance platform to monitor, supervise, and control all agents in production
- ACF Certification: 3-level certification program to prove governance compliance
